an acquisition of Mac-Gray by its portfolio company, CSC

bid_claims.quote_text: On June 21, 2013, Party A submitted an unsolicited proposal to the Mac-Gray Board of Directors offering to purchase Mac-Gray for an all-cash purchase price of $17.00 to $19.00 per share
On July 23, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share.
On July 24, 2013, Party B submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $17.00 to $18.00 per share.
Also on July 24, 2013, representatives from Party C called BofA Merrill Lynch and presented an oral preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $15.00 to $17.00 per share.
Later on July 25, 2013, Party C submitted a written indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $16.50 per share.
On September 9, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $19.50 per share
On September 9, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share
On September 10, 2013, Party A submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share

Also on September 10, 2013, in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch, a representative of Party C indicated that it was submitting a revised oral indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share.

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch was engaged to assist Mac-Gray in its review of strategic alternatives, including a potential sale process.
event_claims.quote_text: On May 31, 2013, Mac-Gray entered into an engagement letter with BofA Merrill Lynch with respect to the Board's undertaking a review of strategic alternatives, including a potential sale process

event_claims.description: The Special Committee determined to approach 50 parties to solicit interest in a transaction with Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text:
Guided by the foregoing principles, the Special Committee determined to approach a total of

31

50 parties, including CSC and Pamplona, who together we refer to as CSC/Pamplona, and Party A, to solicit potential interest in a transaction with Mac-Gray, 15 of which were potential strategic buyers and 35 of which were potential financial buyers, including private equity firms.

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch contacted strategic and financial parties identified by the Special Committee.
event_claims.quote_text: During the next several weeks, in accordance with the directives of the Special Committee, BofA Merrill Lynch contacted the strategic and financial parties identified at the June 24th Special Committee meeting.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 23, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a preliminary indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 24, 2013, Party B submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $17.00 to $18.00 per share.

event_claims.description: Party C presented an oral preliminary indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on July 24, 2013, representatives from Party C called BofA Merrill Lynch and presented an oral preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $15.00 to $17.00 per share.

event_claims.description: Party A submitted an unsolicited proposal to acquire Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text: On June 21, 2013, Party A submitted an unsolicited proposal to the Mac-Gray Board of Directors offering to purchase Mac-Gray for an all-cash purchase price of $17.00 to $19.00 per share

event_claims.description: Party A attended a management presentation as part of the sale process.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 14, 2013, representatives of Party A attended a management presentation at the Boston office of Goodwin Procter with members of Mac-Gray management, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch and the two members of the Transaction Committee.

event_claims.description: Party B attended a management presentation as part of the sale process.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 6, 2013, representatives of Party B attended a management presentation at the Boston office of Goodwin Procter with members of Mac-Gray management, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch and a member of the Transaction Committee.

event_claims.description: Party C attended a management presentation as part of the sale process.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 8, 2013, representatives of Party C attended a management presentation at the Boston office of Goodwin Procter with members of Mac-Gray management, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch and a member of the Transaction Committee.

event_claims.description: CSC and Pamplona attended a management presentation as part of the sale process.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 12, 2013, representatives of CSC and Pamplona attended a management presentation at the Boston office of Goodwin Procter with members of Mac-Gray management, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch and the two members of the Transaction Committee.

event_claims.actor_label: Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona
event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch requested final indications of interest from each of Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona by September 18, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: the Special Committee instructed BofA Merrill Lynch to call each of Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona to request final indications of interest by September 18, 2013

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona requested that Mac-Gray agree to exclusive negotiations for two weeks.
event_claims.quote_text: requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to exclusive negotiations for two weeks
